prosecutingAuthority.description: Identifies the Prosecuting Organisation responsible for initiating the case. Valid CJS OU Code.

informant.description: Name of the person to be named as the informant in this case.

urn.description: The unique reference number from the prosecuting authority
urn.title: URN

caseMarker.description: To be populated if a CJS agreed Case Marker applies. Multiple values to be separated by a space
